item.title: Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator [File Management]
item.itunes:title: Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator [File Management]
item.itunes:author: diana2019
item.itunes:summary:
Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator
(File Management)
Do you want an effective solution to manage your drive data? Shoviv Software has developed a reliable tool to do this task effectively. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator is an easy and secure solution to transfer data from one drive to another. This software is capable of moving data from Google Drive to OneDrive, Google Drive to Google Drive, OneDrive to OneDrive, and Local drive migration as well.
It also offers a filter facility that users can use to add or remove items as per their requirements before processing the drive migration task. Users can schedule their migration job on a regular basis, such as daily, weekly, monthly or at any specific date and time. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator also provides the facility to copy and paste data from one drive to another.
The GUI of the tool is so simple even the new users can understand the entire migration task easily. Users can process large-sized data in this tool as there is no size restriction. This software allows for the creation and running of numerous jobs at a time; the process’s speed will not change. If you want to know more about this tool’s features, kindly use its free demo version, which is available on the official website of Shoviv.

[read more]
item.description:
Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator
(File Management)
Do you want an effective solution to manage your drive data? Shoviv Software has developed a reliable tool to do this task effectively. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator is an easy and secure solution to transfer data from one drive to another. This software is capable of moving data from Google Drive to OneDrive, Google Drive to Google Drive, OneDrive to OneDrive, and Local drive migration as well.
It also offers a filter facility that users can use to add or remove items as per their requirements before processing the drive migration task. Users can schedule their migration job on a regular basis, such as daily, weekly, monthly or at any specific date and time. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator also provides the facility to copy and paste data from one drive to another.
The GUI of the tool is so simple even the new users can understand the entire migration task easily. Users can process large-sized data in this tool as there is no size restriction. This software allows for the creation and running of numerous jobs at a time; the process’s speed will not change. If you want to know more about this tool’s features, kindly use its free demo version, which is available on the official website of Shoviv.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator
(File Management)
Do you want an effective solution to manage your drive data? Shoviv Software has developed a reliable tool to do this task effectively. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator is an easy and secure solution to transfer data from one drive to another. This software is capable of moving data from Google Drive to OneDrive, Google Drive to Google Drive, OneDrive to OneDrive, and Local drive migration as well.
It also offers a filter facility that users can use to add or remove items as per their requirements before processing the drive migration task. Users can schedule their migration job on a regular basis, such as daily, weekly, monthly or at any specific date and time. Shoviv Cloud Drive Migrator also provides the facility to copy and paste data from one drive to another.
The GUI of the tool is so simple even the new users can understand the entire migration task easily. Users can process large-sized data in this tool as there is no size restriction. This software allows for the creation and running of numerous jobs at a time; the process’s speed will not change. If you want to know more about this tool’s features, kindly use its free demo version, which is available on the official website of Shoviv.

item.title: Photos Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photos Undelete Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Photos Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Click on website address www.digitalcameraundelete.com for installing Photos Undelete Software that is very helpful to bring back misplaced photo from crashed USB removable media drive due to system failure, improper handling of device, improper system shutdown, virus attack etc. Digital wallpaper undelete tool easily used by user without taking any technical guidance and restore all images in various file formats including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Photos Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Click on website address www.digitalcameraundelete.com for installing Photos Undelete Software that is very helpful to bring back misplaced photo from crashed USB removable media drive due to system failure, improper handling of device, improper system shutdown, virus attack etc. Digital wallpaper undelete tool easily used by user without taking any technical guidance and restore all images in various file formats including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff etc.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Photos Undelete Software
(Utilities)
Click on website address www.digitalcameraundelete.com for installing Photos Undelete Software that is very helpful to bring back misplaced photo from crashed USB removable media drive due to system failure, improper handling of device, improper system shutdown, virus attack etc. Digital wallpaper undelete tool easily used by user without taking any technical guidance and restore all images in various file formats including jpg, jpeg, gif, tiff etc.

item.title: Celeste Classic [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Celeste Classic [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Celeste Classic
(Jump N Run)
A hardcore platformer by Matt Thorson and Noel Berry, that authours made in 4 days.
They used pretty much all our resources for this. 8186/8192 code, the entire spritemap, the entire map, and 63/64 sounds.

Let us know what you think! :)

This is a C source port
[read more]
item.description:
Celeste Classic

They used pretty much all our resources for this. 8186/8192 code, the entire spritemap, the entire map, and 63/64 sounds.

Let us know what you think! :)

This is a C source port
[read more]

A hardcore platformer by Matt Thorson and Noel Berry, that authours made in 4 days.
They used pretty much all our resources for this. 8186/8192 code, the entire spritemap, the entire map, and 63/64 sounds.

Let us know what you think! :)

This is a C source port

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]




"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!

item.content:encoded:
Sony-ify
(Virtualization)

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Bad Time Simulator - Sans Fight
(Jump N Run)
Offline version of the popular game - Linux, Mac and Windows builds

Bad Time Simulator is a skill game that is also famous as Sans Fight. Play this game to test your skills by protecting your heart or soul from Sans' attacks. Are you confident with your skills to defeat the legendary Sans with epic power?

This project is a clone of the sans fight from Undertale. It was made with Construct 2.

You can buy full version here:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/391540/Undertale/
[read more]

This project is a clone of the sans fight from Undertale. It was made with Construct 2.

You can buy full version here:
https://store.steampowered.com/app/391540/Undertale/
[read more]
